_note: Node-local reachability monitor config (ADR-0019). Copy to a local, gitignored path (e.g. /var/lib/mycelium/reach.config.json) and pass it via 'myceliumd --reachability-config'. 'ref' is the opaque label shown on /reachability; 'address' and 'server_name' stay local and are NEVER exposed. Replace these example public-DNS anchors with the anchors this node should measure. With no config supplied, the monitor does not run.
